subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! When thou hearest My Call and attainest unto My Book and findest therein the fragrance of Mine utterance, say: O Thou in Whose grasp [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد اذا سمعت ندائی و فزت بکتابی و وجدت منه عرف بیانی قل یا من فی قبضتک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
